LAW AND MOTION 302, RE: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION ATTENDANCE OF A PERSON MOST QUALIFIED AND CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS OF DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC, AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION OF THE JUDGE PRO TEM IS ADOPTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND ATTACH A COPY OF THE REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210005840) FILED BY DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS

MAY-01-2023, DEPT. 206, MASTER CALENDAR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO: ATTORNEYS OF RECORD ROGER KIRNOS, MAXWELL KREYMER, MAITE C. COLON, JESSICA BURT-SMITH OF KNIGHT LAW GROUP, LLP FOR PLAINTIFFS; AND ATTORNEYS OF RECORD MARY ARENS MCBRIDE AND CAMERON MAJOR OF ERSKINE LAW GROUP, PC FOR DEFENDANT SET ON MAY-01-2023 - JESSICA BURT-SMITH, ESQ. APPEARING VIA COURTCALL ON BEHALF OF KNIGHT LAW GROUP, LLP, COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFFS. (MS. BURT-SMITH WAS ACTUALLY APPEARING ON ANOTHER MATTER ON THE CALENDAR AND HEARD THAT THIS CASE WAS ALSO ON CALENDAR.) NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT CONTINUED THE OSC TO MAY-15-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR COUNSEL FROM BOTH SIDES (PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANT) TO APPEAR. YOU ARE HEREBY ORDERED TO APPEAR ON MAY-15-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 206 TO SHOW CAUSE WHY YOU SHOULD NOT BE SANCTIONED FOR FAILING TO: COMPLY WITH THE ORDER SETTING MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE DATED MARCH 17, 2023, INCLUDING: FAILING TO RESPOND TO THE ASSIGNED SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFFICER TO COORDINATE A PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE CALL, FAILING TO PARTICIPATE IN A PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE CALL, FAILING TO SUBMIT TIMELY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE STATEMENTS, WHICH NONCOMPLIANCE REQUIRED THE COURT TO VACATE THE APRIL 17, 2023 SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ACTIONS ARE A VIOLATION OF CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT, RULE 3.1380(C), LOCAL RULE 5.0.A, LOCAL RULE 5.0.F, AND THE MARCH 17, 2023 ORDER SETTING MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. (C.C.P. 177.5, 575.2; CRC 2.30, 3.1380; LRSF 5.0.) CRC 3.110(I) REQUIRES THAT RESPONSIVE PAPERS TO AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE MUST BE FILED AND SERVED AT LEAST 5 CALENDAR DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. IN ADDITION, THE COURT ISSUED AN ADDITIONAL ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AGAINST CAMERON MAJOR, COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT, FOR FAILING TO APPEAR AT THIS 05/01/23 OSC HEARING. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210036960) FILED BY DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS

NOTICE SENT BY COURT. (206)

MAY-01-2023, DEPT. 206, MASTER CALENDAR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO: ATTORNEYS OF RECORD ROGER KIRNOS, MAXWELL KREYMER, MAITE C. COLON, JESSICA BURT-SMITH OF KNIGHT LAW GROUP, LLP FOR PLAINTIFFS; AND ATTORNEYS OF RECORD MARY ARENS MCBRIDE AND CAMERON MAJOR OF ERSKINE LAW GROUP, PC FOR DEFENDANT SET ON MAY-01-2023 - JESSICA BURT-SMITH, ESQ. APPEARING VIA COURTCALL ON BEHALF OF KNIGHT LAW GROUP, LLP, COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFFS. (MS. BURT-SMITH WAS ACTUALLY APPEARING ON ANOTHER MATTER ON THE CALENDAR AND HEARD THAT THIS CASE WAS ALSO ON CALENDAR.) NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT CONTINUED THE OSC TO MAY-15-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR COUNSEL FROM BOTH SIDES (PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANT) TO APPEAR. YOU ARE HEREBY ORDERED TO APPEAR ON MAY-15-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 206 TO SHOW CAUSE WHY YOU SHOULD NOT BE SANCTIONED FOR FAILING TO: COMPLY WITH THE ORDER SETTING MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE DATED MARCH 17, 2023, INCLUDING: FAILING TO RESPOND TO THE ASSIGNED SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFFICER TO COORDINATE A PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE CALL, FAILING TO PARTICIPATE IN A PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE CALL, FAILING TO SUBMIT TIMELY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE STATEMENTS, WHICH NONCOMPLIANCE REQUIRED THE COURT TO VACATE THE APRIL 17, 2023 SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ACTIONS ARE A VIOLATION OF CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT, RULE 3.1380(C), LOCAL RULE 5.0.A, LOCAL RULE 5.0.F, AND THE MARCH 17, 2023 ORDER SETTING MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. (C.C.P. 177.5, 575.2; CRC 2.30, 3.1380; LRSF 5.0.) CRC 3.110(I) REQUIRES THAT RESPONSIVE PAPERS TO AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE MUST BE FILED AND SERVED AT LEAST 5 CALENDAR DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. IN ADDITION, THE COURT ISSUED AN ADDITIONAL ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AGAINST CAMERON MAJOR, COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT, FOR FAILING TO APPEAR AT THIS 05/01/23 OSC HEARING. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)
